name: Blueberry Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh blueberries (or dry packed frozen, rinsed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening until soft.
3. Gradually beat in the sugar.
4. Add the eggs and lemon rind; beat until well mixed.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk, beating until smooth after each addition.
6. Lightly fold in the blueberries.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
